narrative:
Springfield Twp H (precinct in Summit County) has 955 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.2 percentage points.
